sentence_reviews.text: A skill library stores reusable procedures, prompts, programs, policies, and workflows that an agent can retrieve and compose for recurring tasks.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: ReAct arXiv abstract, lines 42-46: interleaved reasoning traces and task-specific actions, plan updating, external sources/environments, Wikipedia API and interactive decision-making tasks. AIMA planning/procedural-action topics support reusable procedures and plans at a textbook level.
sentence_reviews.notes: Reusable procedures/programs/workflows are defensible from procedural memory and planning/tool-use concepts; prompts as stored skills are modern synthesis.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Skill libraries, workflows & procedural plans is to connect Procedural memory & skills, Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations to downstream capabilities including Autonomous software-engineering agents, Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: ReAct arXiv abstract, lines 42-46: interleaved reasoning traces and task-specific actions, plan updating, external sources/environments, Wikipedia API and interactive decision-making tasks. AIMA planning/procedural-action topics support reusable procedures and plans at a textbook level.
sentence_reviews.notes: Procedural memory and programs are relevant, but downstream software/multiagent roles are graph-derived.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: ReAct arXiv abstract, lines 42-46: interleaved reasoning traces and task-specific actions, plan updating, external sources/environments, Wikipedia API and interactive decision-making tasks. sentence_reviews.notes: Software agents can retrieve procedures/programs, but the cited sources do not directly cover autonomous software agents.

sentence_reviews.text: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Procedural memory & skills, Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations.

AIMA planning/procedural-action topics support reusable procedures and plans at a textbook level.
sentence_reviews.notes: Generic search/self-evaluation limitation is not specific to skill libraries in inspected evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: Skill libraries, workflows & procedural plans uses Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_reviews.text: Skill libraries, workflows & procedural plans uses Observe–plan–act agent loops as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

AIMA planning/procedural-action topics support reusable procedures and plans at a textbook level.
sentence_reviews.notes: Agent loops can retrieve and compose skills during action selection; common strength is defensible.

edge_reviews.notes: A skill library centrally stores/retrieves procedural knowledge.
Program artifacts are core examples, though AST/IR is broader implementation detail.
Agent loops commonly invoke skill libraries but do not define them.
